name: CricketR - The Virtual Reality Cricket Game

reviews.review_description:
Hi 

I am really much satisfied with this Cricket App. This really saved some money when compared to IB Crciket... I see no much difference between this too. The way CircketR is desinged is really nice and had a very good experience. Mindblowing. hats off to the team.

reviews.review_title: One of the best of its Kind.
reviews.review_description: Writing this review on my experience we had. It is really wonderful and something it gives a feel like we are inside Chennai MAC stadium. Team expecting more udpates and keep up the good work....
The game feels great. Can’t wait for the single player story mode to be unlocked.

I was using this CricketR app for a long time. It is very awesome and the new design launched by Madras Mindworks really great. Highly recommended app for Cricket lovers...
Keep up the Good Work.

developer_response.body: Thank you so much for your kind words! We’re thrilled to hear that you’ve been enjoying the CricketR game. Your support means a lot to us! We’re committed to making it even better for cricket lovers like you. Stay tuned for more updates, and keep playing!

reviews.review_title: One of the best Cricket VR game
reviews.review_description: If you are a cricket fan and enjoy VR gaming means this game will hook you up.

developer_response.body: Thank you so much! 🎉 We're thrilled to hear that you're excited about the game! Whether you're a cricket fan or a VR gaming enthusiast, we've designed this experience to immerse you in the action. Can't wait for you to try it out and hear your thoughts! 🏏🔥

reviews.review_description:
If you are looking for short cricket matches, this game is good with 2 - 5 overs match.

Easy tutorial, Gameplay is good, accuracy of shots is good.

developer_response.body:
Thank you for your kind words! We’re thrilled to hear that you're enjoying the short cricket matches.

We’re excited to share that we have some new features on the way that we think you’ll love. Soon, we’ll be rolling out the updates, They are designed to make the game even more engaging and enjoyable.

Stay tuned for more details and updates! If you have any suggestions or feedback, feel free to share we always appreciate hearing from our players.

Thanks for your support and happy playing!

Best regards,
Madras MindGames

reviews.review_title: Very bad game need update need improveme
reviews.review_description:
Very bad game need update need improveme  game 
Like ib criket

developer_response.body:
Thank you for your feedback. We're sorry to hear that you're not satisfied with the game. We are constantly working on updates and improvements to enhance the experience for all players. Your input is valuable, and we'll definitely take it into consideration as we make future updates. If you have specific suggestions or issues you'd like to share, please let us know so we can address them directly.

Thanks for your support and patience!

Best regards,
Madras MindGames
